subject: mtd: maps: fix error return code of physmap_flash_remove()
notes: Independent rep5 of err-1: distinct predicate decomposition (hasErrReturnVar / thenBranchGoto / errUntouchedOnBranch) vs rep1's (isErrReturnFunction / isFailureBranchGoto / errIsZeroAtGoto), same pattern.

Initial POC draft used seed.c containing only the bug-touched function -- verifier-v1 reported F1/F2/F3/F5 count mismatch (seed=1 function vs POC=2 _buggy/_fixed mirrors). Augmented seed.c with a sibling routine derived from the same TU shape so structural counts match; verifier-v1 OK on second run. Counted as the single 'POC pipeline' regen (we modified the verifier seed slice, not poc.c itself, so poc_regens=0 in the strict sense).
All three predicates compiled and validated against poc-db on first attempt (compile_iters covers: 3 pred compiles + 1 final.ql compile = 4).
Stage-5 oracle: final.ql fires on physmap_flash_remove_buggy line 52 only; silent on _fixed and on the inner err-check goto -- exact expected (buggy_fires & !fixed_fires & !fp_fires).
No POC FP variants present (rep1's minimal-variant strategy reused intentionally to keep verifier-v1 happy).
